data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Verified the Refine Scope action disables once enqueue succeeds, shows a visible 'Refinement pending' indicator while the beat id remains in the pending store, and re-enables only after the completion polling hook marks that beat complete. Added automated coverage for store behavior, HeaderActions wiring, and completion round-trip clearing. Sanity gates verified in /Users/cartine/foolery/.claude/worktrees/aae0-refine-scope-pending: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2331 passed), and bun run build all succeeded.
